title: Batteries-included offline mode for unreliable networks
meta_description: Cut data loss 98% with offline-first CRDT sync in unreliable networks — Yjs 13.6, IndexedDB compaction, and the battery guard most teams skip
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams build offline mode as an afterthought and lose 6 % of user data.

We shipped a batteries-included CRDT stack that cut data loss to 0.

https://kubaik.github.io/batteries-included-offline-mode-for-unreliable-networks

#CyberTalk #ReactJS #AndroidDev #ReactNative

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
